description:
Pre-existing flaky test surfaced after mutagen-hcs.9 fixed the ast spec verification grep (2026-06-24). It keeps `mix spec.check` intermittently red (mutagen.ast's `mix test test/mutagen_ex/ast_test.exs` verification command) AND can intermittently fail the new GitHub Actions CI (.5 runs `mix test` under a random seed).

## Bug
test/mutagen_ex/ast_test.exs, test "does NOT call String.to_atom on the target string (r8 invariant)" (~line 135) snapshots the GLOBAL atom table:
    before_count = :erlang.system_info(:atom_count)
    assert Ast.find_module_body(ast, target) == :not_found
    after_count = :erlang.system_info(:atom_count)
    assert before_count == after_count
ast_test runs async with max_cases:20, so a CONCURRENT async test minting an atom between the two snapshots makes after_count > before_count and the assertion fails (memory note: 37994 vs 37996). Passes in isolation, flakes in the full suite / under some seeds.

## Fix (scope: test/mutagen_ex/ast_test.exs, and only if needed test_helper)
Make the r8 atom-count invariant non-racy WITHOUT weakening what it checks (the real invariant: Ast.find_module_body must not call String.to_atom on the target). Preferred approaches, pick the soundest:
- Make this specific test (or a dedicated describe block / the module) `async: false` so no other test runs concurrently during the atom-count window — simplest, keeps the global-counter check honest.
- OR assert the invariant more robustly: e.g. call find_module_body many times in a tight loop and assert the atom count does not grow by N (a concurrent one-off atom mint is dwarfed), or check that the specific target atom was NOT created (`:erlang...`/catch ArgumentError on `String.to_existing_atom(target)` after the call) rather than a global delta.
Keep the test meaningful: it must still FAIL if find_module_body ever calls String.to_atom on the target.

## Acceptance
- `mix spec.check` => status=pass errors=0 (mutagen.ast green; run it a few times to confirm no flake).
- The test still catches a regression: temporarily make find_module_body call String.to_atom(target) and confirm the test fails; revert.
- `mix test` green across several seeds (e.g. seeds 0, 1, 42, plus a couple random) AND `make smoke` green repeated runs.
title: Deflake ast_test atom-count assertion (racy global :atom_count under async)
